# Developer Guidelines

## Communication
- Provide honest and frank responses following best practices
- Avoid asking unnecessary questions when action can be taken
- Take initiative and implement solutions directly

## Code Standards
- Write all code comments in English
- Follow current best practices for all languages and frameworks
- Avoid deprecated code
- Avoid vulnerable code patterns
- Follow official recommendations for languages, frameworks, and libraries
- Avoid over-testing and unnecessary complexity

## Code Quality
- Clean code between iterations - remove dead/unused code
- Optimize for performance
- Optimize for security
- Optimize for maintainability
- Optimize for readability
- Optimize for simplicity
- Use explicit variable names
- Pay attention to code indentation

## Documentation
- Do not write documentation unless explicitly requested
- Keep implementation notes minimal and practical
- Focus on code over documentation

## Testing
- Propose Cypress tests when appropriate
- Ensure tests are practical and necessary

## Design System
- Create reusable components in the design system when appropriate
- Ensure consistency across contexts
- Follow established patterns and conventions
